PostToolUse.name: email-template-created
PostToolUse.description: Remind about template best practices when a mail template XML file is written

hooks.message:
[odoo-report] Email template file created. Verify:
- mail.template record has body_html (not body)
- subtype_id references mail.mt_comment for Chatter integration
- email_to uses dynamic field (e.g. ${object.partner_id.email})
- Run /validate-template to check for QWeb syntax errors

PostToolUse.name: email-template-modified
PostToolUse.description: Remind about QWeb rendering checks when a mail template XML file is edited

hooks.message:
[odoo-report] Email template modified. Check:
- body_html field uses t-esc or t-out (not t-raw in Odoo 16+)
- Conditional blocks use t-if not attrs
- Dynamic fields wrapped in <span t-esc="object.field"/>
- Test render via Settings > Technical > Email Templates > Send Test

PostToolUse.name: qweb-report-created
PostToolUse.description: Remind about QWeb report structure when a report XML file is written

hooks.message:
[odoo-report] QWeb report file created. Verify:
- ir.actions.report record has report_type="qweb-pdf" or "qweb-html"
- Report template id matches report_name in ir.actions.report
- Page layout uses t-call="web.external_layout" for header/footer
- Report is listed in __manifest__.py under 'data'

PostToolUse.name: qweb-report-modified
PostToolUse.description: Remind about QWeb page layout checks when a report XML file is edited

hooks.message:
[odoo-report] QWeb report modified. Check:
- t-foreach loops use t-as to alias the current record
- Currency/amount fields use res-lang's format_currency or monetary widget
- Page breaks use <div style="page-break-after: always"/>
- Paper format declared via report_paperformat_id in ir.actions.report

PostToolUse.name: manifest-report-check
PostToolUse.description: Remind to include report files in manifest data array when manifest is edited

hooks.message:
[odoo-report] Manifest modified. Verify report/email template files are in 'data' array:
- 'data/mail_template_*.xml' (email templates)
- 'reports/*.xml' (QWeb report actions + templates)
- Order matters: security XML before access CSV before data files
